briefdescription.para: Check if NetCDF support is available.
Check if parallel NetCDF with MPI support is available.
Set MPI communicator for parallel I/O.
Check if MPI is enabled for this file.
Open NetCDF file with MPI support.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, temperature, pressure, humidity, wind_u, wind_v, surface_pressure, rc)
memberdef.name: netcdf_read_meteorology
